steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line
steps.content: From the graph, the line passes through two easy-to-read points: the y-intercept at $(0, 100)$ and the point $(100, 225)$. The slope is $$m = \frac{225 - 100}{100 - 0} = \frac{125}{100} = \frac{5}{4}$$

steps.title: Write the equation of the line
steps.content: With slope $m = \frac{5}{4}$ and y-intercept $b = 100$, the equation is $$y = \frac{5}{4}x + 100$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 60 to find the cost
steps.content: At $x = 60$ rings: $$y = \frac{5}{4}(60) + 100 = 75 + 100 = 175$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
